calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-05-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-26-2022 Continued To Dec-05-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jul-07-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated June 10, 2009, is admitted to probate. Timothy Von Herrmann is appointed Administrator with full authority. Bond is set at $520,000. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for July 18, 2022, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.
